sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111565" key="filo/fqoggos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλό-φθογγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111565.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving noise, noisy,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκύλακες</foreign> Anyte ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.48</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
